command_redacted:
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; hash -r 2>/dev/null || true
gcloud config set project qalam-app-bd7d0 2>&1 | tail -1
echo "=== billing (GA command) ==="
gcloud billing projects describe qalam-app-bd7d0 --format='value(billingEnabled)' 2>&1 | head -3
echo "=== enabling APIs (run, cloudbuild, secretmanager, artifactregistry) ==="
gcloud services enable run.googleapis.com cloudbuild.googleapis.com secretmanager.googleapis.com artifactregistry.googleapis.com --project=qalam-app-bd7d0 2>&1 | tail -8
echo "exit=$?"
description: Set project, check billing, enable required APIs

command_redacted:
echo "=== did flutter create modify any TRACKED files? (watch lib/ and test/) ==="
git status --short | grep -vE "^\?\?" | sed -n '1,30p'
echo "--- untracked top-level additions ---"
git status --short | grep -E "^\?\?" | grep -iE "ios/|metadata|widget_test" | head
echo ""
echo "=== firebase CLI logged in? ==="
firebase login:list 2>&1 | head -8
description: Verify no tracked files clobbered and check firebase auth
